name: Rocky Mountain Chocolate Factory, Inc.
business: Rocky Mountain Chocolate Factory, Inc. produces an extensive line of premium chocolate and other confectionery products. Revenues are derived from sales to franchisees and other third parties, Company-owned store sales, and franchise fees/royalties. The company sells its products through franchised stores, licensed stores, and specialty markets.
sellsTo: specialty market customers (wholesale, fundraising, corporate sales, e-commerce, private label)

exposures.sentence: We produce an extensive line of premium chocolate and other confectionery products.
We are currently selling our products in a select number of Specialty Markets, including wholesale, fundraising, corporate sales, e-commerce, and private label (collectively Specialty Markets).

catalysts.event: Signed four area development agreements to add 34 new franchise stores over the next three to five years
catalysts.sentence: In FY 2026 the Company signed four area development agreements that include the addition of 34 new franchise stores over the next three to five years.
